articles.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
articles.description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

articles.title: SEC eyes shift to twice-yearly earnings reports
articles.description: The SEC is working on a proposal to allow public companies to release earnings reports twice a year instead of quarterly, per the WSJ.

articles.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
articles.description: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

articles.title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

articles.title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
articles.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

articles.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
articles.description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

articles.title: Samsung bets this island startup can tame the grid with software and batteries
articles.description: GridBeyond's hardware and software coordinates several gigawatts of supply and demand to help balance the flow of electricity on the grid. The idea has attracted investors like Samsung Ventures.

articles.title: Apple acquires video editing software company MotionVFX
articles.description: The move could help Apple better compete with Adobe Premiere Pro and the Adobe Creative Cloud suite.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
articles.description: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

articles.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 uses generative AI to boost photorealism in video games, with ambitions beyond gaming
articles.description: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 uses generative AI and structured graphics data to make video games more realistic. CEO Jensen Huang says the approach could eventually spread to other industries.

articles.title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit
articles.description: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."

articles.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
articles.description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

articles.title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
articles.description: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

articles.title: Fuse raises $25M  to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
articles.description: The startup also announced a $5 million "rescue fund" to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

articles.title: The dictionary sues OpenAI
articles.description: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster say that OpenAI violated the copyright of almost 100,000 articles by using them for LLM training.

articles.title: Shopify is preparing for AI shopping agents to change everything, exec says

articles.title: Apple quietly launches AirPods Max 2
articles.description: The successor to its premium headphones cost $549 and are launching with enhanced active noise cancellation, the H2 chip, live translation, better sound quality, and more.

articles.title: Walmart-backed PhonePe shelves IPO as global tensions rattle markets
